writeup_note_markdown:
# Unified Fermion Mapping Note

## Objective

This note freezes the current bounded matter-sector mapping into one
manuscript-safe summary across:

- down-type quarks
- leptons
- up-type quarks

all carried on the shared `SU(2)` topological gap ladder.

## Locked Classification

- `unified_fermion_mapping_note_confirmed`

## Sector Summary

| Sector | Integer | A | B | Tuple | Sector MAPE |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---:|
| `Down-Type Quarks` | 2 | 0.1914656 | 2.0732971 | `(-3, 0, 3)` | 0.01560% |
| `Leptons` | 3 | 0.0028923 | 3.0330469 | `(0, 5, 0)` | 0.20160% |
| `Up-Type Quarks` | 4 | 0.0034558 | 4.0347093 | `(-2, 2, 0)` | 0.00669% |

## Full 9-Fermion Readout

| Sector | Particle | Gen | Predicted mass (MeV) | Experimental mass (MeV) | Percent error |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| `Down-Type Quarks` | `down` | 1 | 4.6694 | 4.6700 | -0.0131% |
| `Down-Type Quarks` | `strange` | 2 | 93.0218 | 93.0000 | +0.0234% |
| `Down-Type Quarks` | `bottom` | 3 | 4179.5695 | 4180.0000 | -0.0103% |
| `Leptons` | `electron` | 1 | 0.5105 | 0.5110 | -0.1044% |
| `Leptons` | `muon` | 2 | 105.9799 | 105.6600 | +0.3028% |
| `Leptons` | `tau` | 3 | 1773.2883 | 1776.8000 | -0.1976% |
| `Up-Type Quarks` | `up` | 1 | 2.1599 | 2.1600 | -0.0044% |
| `Up-Type Quarks` | `charm` | 2 | 1270.1275 | 1270.0000 | +0.0100% |
| `Up-Type Quarks` | `top` | 3 | 172750.2075 | 172760.0000 | -0.0057% |

## Interpretation

The current bounded lock is:

- down-type quarks land near sector integer `2`
- leptons land near sector integer `3`
- up-type quarks land near sector integer `4`

with each sector carrying a distinct small-integer branch tuple:

- down-type: `(-3, 0, 3)`
- leptons: `(0, 5, 0)`
- up-type: `(-2, 2, 0)`

The manuscript-safe conclusion is:

> The currently mapped matter sectors admit a common weak-gap vacuum ladder,
> but they couple to that ladder through sector-specific integer branch
> patterns and sector-specific near-integer slope classes.

The cleanest current structural features are:

- a down-type middle-generation anchor
- a lepton/up-type shared third-generation anchor
- a near-integer matter-sector slope ladder `{2, 3, 4}`

## Promotion Boundary

This note promotes:

- the unified bounded 9-fermion mapping artifact
- the sector-integer ladder `{2, 3, 4}` as the cleanest current matter-sector summary
- the claim that the mapped matter sectors live on one shared weak-gap ladder

This note does **not** promote:

- full Standard Model completion beyond the mapped sectors
- neutrino, CKM, or PMNS closure
- a final continuum or group-theoretic derivation
